summary: Iter83 Phase 2 & 3 — Quiz JAPAP + Tap Challenge unified points engine. 18/18 backend tests PASS (quiz start/submit/history/admin + tap status/start/submit/admin + scoring tiers 25/55/85/200 + anti-cheat cap + day limits 3/1 + reset-user wipes + non-admin 403). Frontend smoke PASS: /games/quiz intro (purple card + Démarrer), /games/tap intro (orange card + Lancer le défi), /services → Jeux cards redirect to /games/quiz and /games/tap, Admin → 'Quiz & Tap' tab loads engagement dashboard with quiz-admin-section + tap-admin-section + games-admin-stat-* + quiz-regenerate-ai-btn.

integration_issues.flow: Tap full in-run interaction (tap-button during the 10s countdown)
integration_issues.issue: After clicking tap-start-btn on /games/tap, the [data-testid=tap-button] element was not queryable within ~1s of the start click. Possibly the intro → 3-2-1 countdown → run transition delays mounting of the tap-button. Backend flow is fully exercised via tests, but UI-level automated tap hammering was not validated end-to-end.

action_items: Confirm that [data-testid='tap-button'] remains mounted from the start-click onward (even during any pre-run countdown) so e2e tests can hammer it reliably.
Nice-to-have: expose [data-testid='tap-countdown'] and [data-testid='tap-run-active'] flags so Playwright can wait for run-active state before tapping.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/quiz.py admin_list_questions interpolates `category` directly into SQL (line ~354) — mitigated because CATEGORIES is a static allowlist, but the endpoint still accepts arbitrary category strings from query params without validating against CATEGORIES → low-risk SQL injection surface. Use parameterized query `category = $3` instead.

routes/tap.py hardcodes TAPS_PER_SEC_CAP=12 and BONUS_TIERS in module scope — fine for now, but the sovereign clamp (10000/25d) happens in points_service; there is no config override in points_service for games ops (good isolation).
Both quiz.py and tap.py use `_ddl_done` module-level flag which means the first-request penalty is paid per-worker; acceptable but document it.
submit endpoints correctly use SELECT … FOR UPDATE + transaction to prevent double-submit race (verified via test_double_submit_blocked).
Admin overview SQL uses `NOW() - ($1 || ' days')::interval` — works with asyncpg but consider `make_interval(days => $1::int)` for safer casts.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (7/8 smoke checks; tap-button mid-run mount not observed in automation)

test_credentials: Admin admin@japap.com / JapapAdmin2024!. User bob@japap.com / Test1234!. Fresh test user auto-registered in fixture (TEST_iter84_*@japap.com, StrongPass1!).
seed_data_creation: Uses admin reset-user endpoints between tests to wipe quiz+tap history for bob so that quota/day tests are deterministic. Registered one fresh TEST_iter84_*@japap.com user (fixture) that remains as regular user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression suite: /app/backend/tests/test_iter84_quiz_tap.py. Run with `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://japap-refactor.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest backend/tests/test_iter84_quiz_tap.py -v -p no:ethereum`. Full run takes ~2m30s. Each test autonomously resets bob's quota via admin endpoints — safe to rerun back-to-back. BASE_URL MUST be injected via env (no default). CSRF uses X-Requested-With: XMLHttpRequest header (not X-CSRF-Token). Admin login does NOT require 2FA. Correct answers for perfect-score test are fetched directly from Neon (quiz_sessions + quiz_questions). Tap scoring tiers validated: 25→+0, 55→+25, 85→+50, 200 raw→120 valid (cap)→+50. Points funnel into points_service and are clamped by the sovereign 10000/25d rule (points_cycle in response body).
rca of the issue: No blocking bugs. Only minor e2e timing issue with [data-testid=tap-button] not captured during automated click hammering — likely a short pre-run countdown. Backend covers the full submit flow via direct API tests, which is the authoritative source of truth.
